reply: (1) This device is a Square D Motor Control Center Panel MCC-003, used to control and protect motors. (2) The most likely cause is a blown fuse or a malfunctioning overload relay, given the continuous running and lack of cutout pressure. (3) The tech should check the fuses and overload relay settings. For an unknown fault, the tech should start by verifying the voltage and current readings, and checking for any visible damage or loose connections.
